data.title: Create trace log format specification (SKILL-TRACE-FORMAT.md)
data.description:
## Description
Create plugins/dso/docs/SKILL-TRACE-FORMAT.md defining:
- Log file path convention: /tmp/dso-skill-trace-<session-id>.log
- All breadcrumb types: SKILL_INVOKE, SKILL_RESUMED, SKILL_ENTER, SKILL_EXIT
- CONTROL_LOSS: detected by analysis script from unmatched SKILL_INVOKE (not a breadcrumb type)
- Field names/types for each breadcrumb: timestamp, skill_name, nesting_depth, skill_file_size, tool_call_count, elapsed_ms, session_ordinal, cumulative_bytes, termination_directive, user_interaction_count
- Depth-passing convention from parent call site
- Known limitations: ordinal resets on compaction, tool count approximate, termination directive scans STATUS line only

## TDD Requirement
Unit test exemption — criterion 3 (static assets only: Markdown documentation with no executable content).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] File exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/SKILL-TRACE-FORMAT.md
- [ ] Defines SKILL_INVOKE
  Verify: grep -q 'SKILL_INVOKE' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/SKILL-TRACE-FORMAT.md
- [ ] Defines SKILL_RESUMED
  Verify: grep -q 'SKILL_RESUMED' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/SKILL-TRACE-FORMAT.md
- [ ] Defines SKILL_ENTER
  Verify: grep -q 'SKILL_ENTER' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/SKILL-TRACE-FORMAT.md
- [ ] Defines SKILL_EXIT
  Verify: grep -q 'SKILL_EXIT' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/SKILL-TRACE-FORMAT.md
- [ ] Defines all 10 data point fields (individual checks)
  Verify: grep -q 'skill_name' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/SKILL-TRACE-FORMAT.md && grep -q 'nesting_depth' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/SKILL-TRACE-FORMAT.md && grep -q 'skill_file_size' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/SKILL-TRACE-FORMAT.md && grep -q 'tool_call_count' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/SKILL-TRACE-FORMAT.md && grep -q 'elapsed_ms' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/SKILL-TRACE-FORMAT.md && grep -q 'session_ordinal' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/SKILL-TRACE-FORMAT.md && grep -q 'cumulative_bytes' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/SKILL-TRACE-FORMAT.md && grep -q 'termination_directive' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/SKILL-TRACE-FORMAT.md && grep -q 'user_interaction_count' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/SKILL-TRACE-FORMAT.md && grep -q 'timestamp' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/SKILL-TRACE-FORMAT.md
